title_zh: 让全球用户真正读懂你的产品
title_en: Make Your Product Truly Understood Worldwide
summary_zh: iCentech 将专业语言服务、工程能力与 AI 工作流结合，帮助企业更快上线多语内容，稳定拓展海外市场。
summary_en: iCentech combines expert language services, engineering capability, and AI workflows to help businesses launch multilingual content faster and scale internationally with confidence.

summary_zh: 覆盖软件、文档、网站、法律及营销内容，提供术语管理、审校、后编辑与质量评估。
summary_en: Covers software, documents, websites, legal and marketing content with terminology management, review, post-editing, and quality evaluation.

summary_zh: 多语种排版与文件工程，兼顾视觉一致性与语言适配。
summary_en: Multilingual desktop publishing and file engineering with visual consistency and language adaptation.

summary_zh: 提供 I18N 工程支持、代码适配、构建与系统集成。
summary_en: Provides I18N engineering support, code adaptation, build, and integration.

summary_zh: 平台兼容、区域数据处理验证与本地化体验验证。
summary_en: Platform compatibility, regional data handling verification, and localization experience validation.

summary_zh: 从转写、翻译到字幕、配音与同步的一体化交付。
summary_en: End-to-end delivery from transcription and translation to subtitling, dubbing, and synchronization.

summary_zh: 支持会议、医疗、政务、媒体发布等多场景口译。
summary_en: Interpreting for conferences, healthcare, public sector, and media events.

summary_zh: 文档翻译、排版、质检和发布一体化流程。
summary_en: Integrated workflow for document translation, DTP, QA, and publishing.

summary_zh: 支持静态站点、动态门户和富媒体网站本地化。
summary_en: Supports localization for static sites, dynamic portals, and rich media websites.

summary_zh: 覆盖 GUI、帮助系统、文档与构建集成的多语发布。
summary_en: Covers GUI, help content, documentation, and build integration for multilingual releases.

summary_zh: 包含转写、翻译、配音、字幕与音视频同步。
summary_en: Includes transcription, translation, dubbing, subtitling, and AV synchronization.

summary_zh: 支持课程内容、交互课件和学习平台本地化。
summary_en: Supports localization for course content, interactive training assets, and learning platforms.

summary_zh: TM、CAT、QA 工具与自动化流程协同驱动高效交付。
summary_en: TM, CAT, QA tools, and automation workflows drive efficient delivery.

summary_zh: NMT + 人工后编辑、AI 质检、会议实时转写与字幕。
summary_en: NMT + human post-editing, AI quality checks, and real-time conference transcription.

summary_zh: 以质量为先、流程驱动、技术提效，支持 100+ 语言交付。
summary_en: Quality-first, process-driven, technology-enabled delivery across 100+ languages.

summary_zh: 行业洞察、案例实践、标准与合规动态。
summary_en: Industry insights, case practices, and standards/compliance updates.

summary_zh: 欢迎加入语言服务、项目管理、工程与质量团队。
summary_en: Join our language, project management, engineering, and QA teams.

summary_zh: 欢迎译员、审校、配音与语言技术人才加入合作网络。
summary_en: Freelance linguists, reviewers, voice talents, and language-tech specialists are welcome.
